_comment: Default-value reference for run_theoremC_phase_diagram.py (C4). Mirrors the C4Config dataclass defaults. The script does NOT auto-load this JSON; to override defaults pass CLI flags. See EXPERIMENT_PLAN_FINAL.MD §7.4 and the script's module docstring. C4 is the thesis's main headline figure: a theorem-C heterogeneity phase diagram over (m, κ, L) computed by operator-level exact optimization only — no learned architectures.
